---
title: "Network Analysis"
---

The final repository provides reproducible curated candidate network tables and simple R validation plots for the manuscript-aligned IL-4/IL-13 ceRNA workflow.

Treatment-specific candidate networks include nominal-discovery downregulated miRNAs, nominal-discovery upregulated mRNAs, nominal-discovery upregulated circRNAs, and curated miRanda-supported miRNA-target edges from the integrated ceRNA network source.

Restricted table sizes:

- IL-4 candidate table: 26 edges and 17 nodes.
- IL-13 candidate table: 7 edges and 7 nodes.
- Strict shared table: 5 unique edges represented with treatment-specific evidence rows.
- FDR-sensitivity network: empty because no miRNAs are FDR significant.

These counts are not complete treatment-wide network sizes. Complete miRanda coverage remains pending complete target resources and a compatible miRanda v3.3a binary.

Mature miRNA query FASTA files are validated to use U rather than T bases before miRanda provenance tables are written.
